description: Goal: restore the northstar pull model before ABI/emission work resumes. Signal: the quicksort trace-summary shows no eager runtime lex/parse before demand, state-derived facts emit only on true revision change, dead-end bottom activations do not churn through the loop, and northstar/telemetry docs describe the corrected invariants plus the rerunnable dump/summary harnesses. Strategy: add a Compiler2-specific test-only trace summary that measures waste directly, push change detection into compiler-owned state transitions, collapse semantic churn at the activation frontier, move runtime bootstrap to reference-only lazy surfaces, then refresh docs and the trace contract so regressions are easy to see.
title: Compiler2 cleanup: make the fixpoint honest, lazy, and quiet
